message:
fix: add gt dolt init to detect/repair workspace pointing at nonexistent database (gt-3k2h5)

When metadata.json is configured for Dolt backend but the database does not
exist in .dolt-data/, the workspace is broken. Added gt dolt init command
that scans all rig metadata, detects missing databases, and repairs them
by migrating local data or creating fresh databases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
